confidence_rationale: Video shows only knot tying technique demonstration without visible Penrose drain, suture placement through marks, or knot pusher usage. Cannot assess critical FLS Task 4 requirements including suture placement accuracy, drain manipulation, or proper task setup.
cannot_determine: Suture placement through Penrose drain marks - no drain visible
Deviation from target marks - marks not visible
Gap in drain after suture placement
Use of knot pusher for delivery
Actual task completion vs technique demonstration
Whether this represents complete Task 4 performance
technique_summary: Demonstrates competent extracorporeal knot tying technique with good manual dexterity and loop control. However, video appears to be technique demonstration rather than complete FLS Task 4 performance.
strengths: Efficient timing for knot formation phase
improvement_suggestions: Cannot provide task-specific suggestions without seeing complete Task 4 setup
Video should include Penrose drain placement and suture targeting for proper assessment
